DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
CROSS-DEFENDANT HUDSON RINCON CENTER, LLC's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT - This matter will be heard in Department 501 (Housing Court) on the same day and time. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Hudson Rincon Center, Llc'S Demurrer To Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-21-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin P. Montee (925-943-6570) of Horner & Singer for Hudson Rincon Center, LLC plaintiff's/cross-defendants and moving parties / Kai Peters (415-986-5900) of Gordon & Rees for Robert Klotz, defendant/cross-complainant and opposing party

Matter added to calendar on FEB-04-2013, therefore no tentative ruling. Court having reviewed the pleadings advises counsles that its leaning is to overrule the demurrer. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts in support of the causes of action. Court hears oral argument and takes Hudson Rincon Center, LLC's demurrer to cross-complaint under submission. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-17-2013 Continued To Feb-04-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANT HUDSON RINCON CENTER, LLC's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is Continued to February 4, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 on the Court's own motion. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2012 Continued To Mar-06-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-13-2012 Continued To Jan-17-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT HUDSON RINCON CENTER, LLC'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is continued to January 17, 2013. The moving party shall provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date by December 20, 2012 per San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The Court has copies of the opposition and reply papers. Judge: Marla Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
